name: cognitivecode
description: Claude Code plugins by Cognitive Code.

plugins.name: lazarus
plugins.description: Raise dead codebases — or any unfamiliar one. Onboard, repair, and audit any repo behind a deterministic destructive-command guard.

plugins.name: lazarus-github
plugins.description: Optional Lazarus companion — turn a CODEBASE_AUDIT.md's Top 10 Action Items into GitHub Issues, ratified before creation and deduped on re-run.

plugins.name: lazarus-forge
plugins.description: Authoring companion — a bounded, runtime-verified design-review gate for Claude Code skill/plugin/agent/MCP/hook proposals. One verdict (BUILD / BUILD-WITH-CHANGES / DO-NOT-BUILD / NEEDS-MORE-DETAIL) and a closed change list, so review converges.
